rationale: Iteration 1: Replace breakout strategy with pure volatility regime signal. Enter when rolling realized vol percentile < 0.4 (calm regime), exit when > 0.7 (unstable). Using 24-bar (1 day) vol lookback and 720-bar (30 day) percentile window. No secondary signals per exploration phase rules.

Also widen percentile_window to 1440 (60 days) for more stable regime classification.

rationale: Iteration 5: Add vol-of-vol stability filter. The raw vol percentile strategy has massive variance across windows. Enter only when vol is BOTH low (calm) AND stable (vol-of-vol is low). This should filter out false calm periods that precede volatility spikes. Use rolling std of realized vol as the vol-of-vol measure.

rationale: Iteration 8: Flip the vol approach. Instead of entering only in calm regimes, use vol compression as an entry signal (breakout setup).
